title: Mo' Glowstone Plus
description: An addon for Mo' Glowstone that adds more colorful glowstone items!
body:
Mo' Glowstone Plus is an addon for the Mo' Glowstone mod! It adds on to the mod by adding colorful glowstone slabs and bricks to light up your Minecraft world!

This mod requires [CTD Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctd-core) and [Mo' Glowstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone) to run!

MasterGeneral156 is kindly maintaining and updating Mo' Glowstone Plus in its original author's absense.  

  
[![Available on Github!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/MasterGeneral156/MoGlowstonePlus) [![Available on CurseForge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-glowstone-plus) [![Available on CurseForge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glowstone-plus)

***MasterGeneral156's mods are also hosted on his mirror at [https://chivalryengine.com/](https://chivalryengine.com/minecraft/mods/themastergeneral/)***
